results.title: Tech Mahindra Boosts AI in Sales with Perplexity Partnership
results.description: Tech Mahindra Partners with Perplexity to Enhance AI-Powered Sales and Customer Engagement Pune – June 29, 2026: Tech Mahindra (NSE: TECHM), a leading global provider of technology consulting and digital solutions to enterprises across industries, announced a partnership with Perplexity to embed AI-powered intelligence across its sales organization. Through the deployment of Perplexity Enterprise Pro, ... Continue reading Tech Mahindra Boosts AI in Sales with Perplexity Partnership →

results.title: Quadrasystems.net achieves ISO/IEC 42001:2023 certification for artificial intelligence management systems
results.description: Quadrasystems.net earned ISO/IEC 42001:2023 certification for its AI management systems. It now provides audited AI governance to over 3,000 enterprise clients.
